A.evidence: Faithful full-text conversion of the paper; prose intact through Sec 3.4. All three tables (DM3519, Physical Specs, 1020/DT4) rendered correctly as GFM. Main weakness: solenoid Eq. (1) emitted as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->' (dropped), though inline variable definitions survive. Minor: dribbler bullet order swapped and a few loose figure-caption fragments (e.g. 'DM3519 FOC controller X4'). Clean heading hierarchy and reading order.

B.evidence: Catastrophically broken. Every line carries raw '<|LOC_..|>' coordinate tokens, and after the first Introduction sentence it collapses into an endless repetition loop of 'It is a group that has been the number of the Imperial College Robotics Society (ICRS)' filling the entire output. No tables, no math, virtually no usable content reached. Worst output.

C.evidence: Clean markdown with correct HTML tables for all three tables. Eq. (1) rendered as LaTeX but with an error (denominator shows (l_a)^2 instead of (rho/a)^2) and a garbled var definition ('r_0 is the cross-sectional area'). Prose faithful. Major structural flaw: the tail (Sec 3.4 and Sec 4) is dumped as a raw JSON array of layout bbox/category blocks instead of prose.

D.evidence: Very clean, faithful conversion. Full prose, correct GFM tables for all three, sensible figure placeholders and good reading order. Eq. (1) usable LaTeX (minor: 2-lambda vs 2-lambda-l, dropped a couple var subscripts). Weakness: section titles ('1 Introduction', '2.2 Wheelbase') are plain text lines, not markdown headers, so heading structure is implicit.

E.evidence: Faithful prose with proper ##/#### headers and correct LaTeX for Eq. (1) (rho/a intact). Table damage: Table 1 'Rated Phase Current...9.2A' and Table 2 'Ball Exposure Area Percentage 82%' rows collapse label+value into one cell; Table 3 has spurious empty trailing columns. Also injects running header '#### 6 M. Liang et al.' mid-flow.

F.evidence: Cleanest of the strong outputs. Full faithful prose, proper markdown heading hierarchy, all three tables as correct HTML, and Eq. (1) as good LaTeX with rho/a and full var definitions. Figure placeholders with captions preserved. Only noise is retained running page headers ('2 M. Liang et al.', page-number lines) interleaved in the flow. Best output.

G.evidence: Readable prose with ## headers and mostly-correct GFM tables (Table 2 'Ball Exposure Area Percentage 82%' merged into one cell). Eq. (1) is structurally garbled: the (r_0/(a/2-lambda-l)N+r_0) grouping is broken and the exponent becomes e^{-rho/2 x}. Noise: stray 'Other' fragments around Fig. 4, doubled '- -' bullet markers, dropped var symbols.

H.evidence: Prose is largely readable but flat plain text with no markdown headings and scattered running headers. Tables destroyed: rendered as sequential one-value-per-line dumps, and Table 2's data is entirely missing (only its caption survives). Eq. (1) is a degenerate loop 'F = 8pi ( d d d d ...)' of hundreds of partial-derivative symbols. Near-worst, above B only because most body text is present.
